title: UPSC Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 194 Manager, Assistant Controller and More Posts
organization: Union Public Service Commission (UPSC), New Delhi
post_name: Airworthiness Officer (DGCA), Deputy Controller of Explosive (PESO), Manager (Mail Motor Service), Junior Technical Officer (Sugar & Veg Oils), Junior Technical Officer (Chemical Engineering), Scientific Officer (Mechanical), Deputy Superintending Archaeological Engineer (ASI), Associate Professor Electrical Engineering (CME Pune), Associate Professor Mechanical Engineering (CME Pune), Lecturer Persian Language (SFL), Lecturer Tibetan Language (SFL), Scientist-B (Atmospheric Sciences / General Meteorology / Instrumentation) (IMD), Deputy Director Civil Engineering (CICEF), Joint Assistant Director (Directorate of Coordination Police Wireless), Assistant Executive Engineer (CGWB), Deputy Director of Mines Safety (Mining), Assistant Director Grade-I/Grade-II (IEDS Chemical) (MSME), and other posts
total_vacancies: 194 posts across 32 vacancies (subject to change as per service requirements)
job_type: Permanent Central Government Service - Group A & Group B Gazetted, Non-Ministerial (varies by post)
short_info: UPSC is recruiting for 32 different posts across Central Government Departments with qualifications ranging from BE/B.Tech to Master's/Ph.D. degree, last date 12 June 2026 (1800 Hrs).

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated separately via email and UPSC website

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 25/- (Non-Refundable) - via Visa/Master/Rupay Credit/Debit Card/UPI/Internet Banking
application_fee.details: Application fee is to be paid online only and is non-refundable. Fee once paid shall not be refunded under any circumstance nor can it be held in reserve for any other examination or selection. Applications without the prescribed fee will be summarily rejected without any representation being entertained.

age_limit.details: Age limits are post-specific and are calculated as on the closing date for submission of online recruitment application i.e. 12-06-2026. The age limits shown in the advertisement are the normal limits for UR/EWS candidates. Standard age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST (5 years), OBC (3 years), and PwBD (10 years) for vacancies reserved/suitable for them. OBC/SC/ST/PwBD candidates applying against unreserved posts are not entitled to age relaxation.

qualification.nationality: Citizen of India, or subject of Nepal/Bhutan, or Tibetan refugee (came before 01-01-1962 intending to permanently settle in India), or person of Indian origin migrated from Pakistan/Burma/Sri Lanka/East African countries intending to permanently settle in India - subject to Government of India eligibility certificate where applicable.
qualification.education_qualification: Varies by post - from Bachelor's degree in Engineering to Master's degree/Ph.D. in the relevant discipline. Refer post-wise details in the notification.
qualification.experience: Varies by post - from nil to 10 years of relevant experience. Part-time/daily wages/visiting/guest faculty experience will NOT be counted. Refer post-wise details.
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of online application i.e. 12-06-2026 (1800 Hrs). Mere possession of minimum essential qualifications does not entitle candidates to be called for interview - UPSC may shortlist candidates based on desirable qualifications, higher educational qualifications, higher experience, or by holding a Recruitment Test. All candidates in Government service (permanent/temporary, other than casual/adhoc/daily wages) must submit a declaration that they have informed their Head of Office/Department in writing that they have applied.

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Bachelor's degree in Physics/Mathematics/Aircraft Maintenance or Engineering Degree in Aeronautical/Mechanical/Electrical/Electronics/Telecommunication from recognized university; AND valid AME License in Category B1 or B2 issued by DGCA (Aeronautical Engineering degree holders may be considered without AME License)
vacancy_details.Essential Experience: Minimum 3 years of Aircraft Maintenance experience on operating aircraft in DGCA-approved Aircraft Maintenance Organization

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Degree in Chemical Engineering/Technology OR Master's Degree in Chemistry from recognized University/Institute
vacancy_details.Essential Experience: 3 years' experience in Chemical works or manufacture/handling of explosives and/or compressed gases and/or refining of Petroleum

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: BE/B.Tech in Mechanical or Automobile Engineering from recognized University/Institute
vacancy_details.Essential Experience: 3 years' experience in operation of Motor Transport Traffic in a Govt./Semi Govt./PSU/Company listed on Indian stock exchange(s)

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: B.Tech/BE (Oil Technology) OR B.Sc. with PG Diploma in Sugar Technology from recognized University/Institute
vacancy_details.Essential Experience: 1 year experience in Sugar Technology or Edible Oils

vacancy_details.Post: Junior Technical Officer (Chemical Engineering) - NSI Kanpur
vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Master's Degree in Chemical Engineering from recognized University/Institute
vacancy_details.Essential Experience: 3 years' research/practical/teaching experience in Chemical Engineering from recognized College/University/Autonomous body OR 3 years' experience in Sugar factory/Distillery/Chemical Plant design or operation

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Master's Degree in Physics OR Degree in Mechanical Engineering OR Degree in Metallurgy from recognized University/Institute
vacancy_details.Essential Experience: 1 year experience in Mechanical Testing Laboratory OR 1 year experience in Research and Development in allied field

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University/Institute
vacancy_details.Essential Experience: 3 years' experience in planning, execution and maintenance of civil engineering works in Government Sector or any recognized Archaeological or heritage site

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: BE/B.Tech in Electrical Engineering AND ME/M.Tech in Electrical Engineering (Power System or related specializations) with First Class; AND Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering
vacancy_details.Essential Experience: Minimum 5 years' experience in Teaching/Research/Industry, of which 2 years post-Ph.D. experience is desirable

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: BE/B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering AND ME/M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering (Heat Transfer/Thermal Engineering or related specializations) with First Class; AND Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering
vacancy_details.Essential Experience: Minimum 5 years' experience in Teaching/Research/Industry, of which 2 years post-Ph.D. experience is desirable

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Master's degree in Persian Language from a recognized University/Institution
vacancy_details.Essential Experience: 1 year experience in teaching or translation from Persian to English/Hindi or vice-versa

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Master's degree in Tibetan Language from a recognized University/Institution
vacancy_details.Essential Experience: 1 year experience in teaching or translation from Tibetan to English/Hindi or vice-versa

Master's Degree in Science in Mathematics/Physics/Atmospheric Science or Physics/Meteorology from recognized University/Institute

Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering OR Master's Degree in Civil Engineering from recognized University/Institute

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: B.Tech/BE/B.Sc. (Engnr.) in Electronics/Electronics & Telecom/Electronics & Communication/IT/Computer Science/ICT/Electrical Engineering (with Telecom special subject) OR Master's degree in Electronics/Computer Science/IT/Artificial Intelligence/Physics with Electronics/Communication/Wireless/Radio specialization
Bachelor's Degree in Drilling/Mining/Mechanical/Electrical/Civil/Agricultural Engineering or Petroleum Technology from recognized University/Institute

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Master's Degree in Chemistry or Industrial Chemistry OR Bachelor's Degree in Chemical Technology or Chemical Engineering from recognized University/Institute

category_wise_vacancy.Post Name: Various other posts (Assistant Directors, Research Officers, Tourist Officer, Driller, etc.)

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 7 to Level 13A1 as per 7th CPC Pay Matrix (varies by post)

selection_process: Selection will be made by Recruitment by Selection - through Interview or Recruitment Test followed by Interview as decided by UPSC on a post-by-post basis. In the event of a large number of applications
UPSC will adopt shortlisting criteria including desirable qualifications
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only at https://upsconline.nic.in/ora/. The UPSC online portal has four modules: Account Creation, Universal Registration (URN), Common Application Form (CAF), and Post/Vacancy-specific module. The first three modules can be filled at any time; the fourth (vacancy-specific) module must be filled during the application window. Candidates who have already registered and have a URN can directly log in and fill the vacancy-specific module. Candidates are strongly advised to use Aadhaar Card as the ID document for seamless verification. Applications once submitted are final - no correction/alteration/modification is permitted after submission. Candidates must take a printout of the finally submitted application and carry it along with original documents if called for interview.
Documents to be Uploaded at the time of Online Application:
Live photograph captured via webcam/camera during CAF filling (mandatory)
Scanned recent passport-size photograph (as per instructions on UPSC website)
important_instructions: Online applications open from 23-05-2026 and close on 12-06-2026 at 1800 Hrs - candidates must apply well in advance without waiting for the closing date. All candidates must enter correct and active email addresses - all correspondence including interview schedules will be communicated only through the registered email ID. Applications once submitted are final - no correction/alteration/modification in any field is allowed after submission. No withdrawal of applications is permitted. The date for determining eligibility in every respect is the closing date for submission of online recruitment application (12-06-2026). Filling wrong information may lead to rejection through computer-based shortlisting apart from debarment by the Commission. Face authentication will be mandatory for all candidates at the examination venue/Interview Hall - candidates must enter well in time for face authentication and frisking. Mobile phones (even in switched-off mode), pagers, smart watches, pen drives, cameras, Bluetooth devices, or any electronic/communication device are strictly banned at the examination/interview venue. Violation leads to disciplinary action including ban from future examinations/recruitment. Candidates must not bring valuables or bags to the venue - no arrangement for safe-keeping will be made and UPSC will not be responsible for any loss. The Commission will contribute towards interview travelling expenses at Second Class Mail railway fare rate by shortest route - candidates will be informed of details when called for interview. Canvassing in any form will disqualify a candidate. Summoning for interview conveys no assurance of selection - appointment orders will be issued by the respective Ministry. UPSC may grant higher initial pay to candidates adjudged meritorious in the interview. The Commission does not enter into correspondence with candidates about reasons for non-selection - no interim enquiry about results will be entertained. Prescribed proforma for various certificates are available at https://upsc.gov.in under Recruitment → Forms of Certificates.
